2336040.name: DC3: Viral Menace
2336040.description:
In DC3: Viral Menace, you play as Dr. Vidya Vichaar, battling a viral infection ravaging her daughter's body. Zoom through artfully crafted levels themed as pages of a comic book in Vidya's magnificent technological ship - The Caper-5000.

Navigate various systems of the human body in this top-down, isometric adventure. Begin in the cavernous respiratory system, descend into the acidic digestive system, propel through the expansive circulatory system, and end your journey in the thunderous nervous system.

Utilize an arsenal of unique weapons, clever upgrades, and powerful turrets to fight hordes of enemies and defend your side-kick, CaByte, as he collects valuable antigen.

  • Move - Hover through the human body by utilizing your Wub-Wub Engines or soar over giant chasms between cells and tissue by activating your Hover engines.

  • Fight - Hold your ground against waves of viruses that stand between you and the cure.

  • Collect - Use CaByte and the ampoule system to collect enriched virus' guts, a.k.a, antigen.

  • Power-Up - Aisle Kyoor, your ally on the outside, provides you with power Blueprints that modify and strengthen your ship's capabilities. 


  • The Swarm - These pesky flocks may seem weak, but their strength is in their numbers.

  • The Mini-Bosses- Exhibiting a distinct desire to eliminate your ship with their dangerous attacks, these bulky agents mean business.

  • The Bosses - Genetically crafted to pack a solid punch, these biological behemoths will stop at nothing to cut your journey short.


  • Deploy - Task CaByte with building stationary but powerful turrets in strategic locations.

  • Control - Harness your turret's unique abilities to recuperate your resources, slow enemy movement, or even weaken their defenses.

  • Utilize - Bolster your cannon to deliver a crushing blow to those stoic bastards that seem to explode out of every cell.
2336040.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 简体中文, 印地语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语
